title: lobelia jaliscensis
intro: Lobelia jaliscensis, also known as Mexican lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia jaliscensis include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Lobelia jaliscensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
